# function: round

Return the nearest integer of an input parameter; rounding half away from zero.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Return the rounding of 1.2:
provider::stdlib::round(1.2)
# result => 1

# Return the rounding of 1.8:
provider::stdlib::round(1.8)
# result => 2

# Return the rounding of 1.5:
provider::stdlib::round(1.5)
# result => 2

# Return the even tiebreak rounding of 2.5:
provider::stdlib::round(2.5, true)
# result => 2

# Return the normal tiebreak rounding of 2.5:
provider::stdlib::round(2.5, false)
# result => 3
```

## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
round(number number, even bool...) number
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `number` (Number) Input number parameter for determining the rounding.
<!-- variadic argument generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `even` (Variadic, Boolean) If true then round 'ties' (i.e. `.5`) to the nearest even integer instead. Specifying `false` is the same as not providing an input value for this parameter (default behavior).
